academics.rigor_self_rating: Standard — mix of regular and honors
academics.above_and_beyond: Captain of basketball team — that's basically my second major. Also did a sports analytics project for AP US History where I analyzed how NBA team strategies have evolved.
academics.approach_to_school: I grind on what I like, do enough on what I don't. School is the price of admission to play ball.

sports.leadership: Team Captain, junior and senior year
sports.achievements: All-FCIAC honorable mention junior year. Team made state tournament sophomore and junior year.
sports.play_in_college: Yes — at any level. D3 academic schools are realistic for me.
sports.recruiting_contact: Three D3 coaches have emailed (Tufts, Trinity, Wesleyan). No formal offers yet.

things_built: Started a YouTube channel breaking down NBA plays — 2,400 subscribers, posting weekly
Run a small sneaker reselling side business on eBay/StockX — made about $3,200 last year
work: Summer job at the Stamford YMCA running their youth basketball camp
activities.community_service: Coach 5th-grade basketball at the Stamford YMCA Saturdays during fall — 3 years running.

identity.first_gen_college: Yes — my mom finished an associate's degree, my dad didn't go beyond high school
identity.other_background: First Black captain of the basketball team in 8 years. Mentioned in a local paper feature.

financial_reality.family_situation: Need significant financial aid. Public schools are a stretch but possible. Private schools only with strong aid packages.
financial_reality.comfortable_with_loans: A small amount only — under $20K total

what_i_want.dream_vibe: Boston brain or NYC energy — somewhere with culture and basketball history
what_i_want.city_vs_campus: City — I want to be near things
what_i_want.sports_culture: I want a real sports culture but D3 is fine
what_i_want.diversity: A lot — I don't want to be one of three Black kids on campus
what_i_want.instant_no: All-white campus where I'm a token
what_i_want.instant_yes: Strong basketball culture + diverse student body + real academics

career_direction.today_pick: Sports management or business — eventually I want to run something in basketball, maybe coach, maybe own a team someday
career_direction.miserable_in_job: Sitting at a desk all day not seeing anyone

real_talk.schools_should_know: I built two businesses while playing varsity basketball and maintaining a 3.4. The numbers don't reflect what I can do under pressure.
real_talk.worry: Picking a school where I can't actually play OR where I'll have to choose between school and basketball. Also the money.
real_talk.success_in_4_years: Playing college basketball at a school I'm proud of, on track to either go pro overseas or start my career in sports business.
real_talk.anything_else: I'm tired of recruiting being treated like the only thing about me. Find me schools where the rest of me matters too.
